landing_pattern: Hero + Problem framing + Features + Social proof + Pricing + CTA
key_considerations: Lead with the outcome and a crisp value claim, then earn trust with logos and metrics before asking for signup.

landing_pattern: Hero + How it works + Security + Numbers + Integrations + CTA
key_considerations: Pair a confident promise with visible compliance and security cues so users feel safe moving money.

landing_pattern: Hero + Account benefits + Security + Rates + Support + CTA
key_considerations: Project stability and longevity; restraint and clarity matter more than novelty for regulated finance.

landing_pattern: Hero + Token utility + Ecosystem + Stats + Roadmap + CTA
key_considerations: Balance bold energy with credibility signals since skepticism is high and clarity reduces perceived risk.

landing_pattern: Hero + Featured products + Categories + Reviews + Offer + CTA
key_considerations: Make products the hero with fast scanning, strong imagery, and a frictionless path to the cart.

landing_pattern: Hero + Brand story + Collection + Craftsmanship + Boutique + CTA
key_considerations: Use generous whitespace and slow pacing; scarcity and provenance carry more weight than discounts.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + How it works + Credentials + Testimonials + CTA
key_considerations: Reassure anxious visitors with warm, legible design and clear proof of expertise and safety.

landing_pattern: Hero + Approach + How it works + Therapists + Reassurance + CTA
key_considerations: Prioritize emotional safety with gentle color, soft type, and language that lowers stigma and pressure.

landing_pattern: Hero + Programs + Results + Coaches + Community + CTA
key_considerations: Drive momentum with strong imagery and transformation proof while keeping the join step obvious.

landing_pattern: Hero + Outcomes + Curriculum + Instructors + Reviews + CTA
key_considerations: Reduce intimidation and show a clear learning path with tangible outcomes and credible instructors.

landing_pattern: Hero + Code sample + Features + Docs preview + Community + CTA
key_considerations: Show real code early; developers trust working examples far more than marketing adjectives.

landing_pattern: Hero + Demo + Capabilities + Use cases + Trust + CTA
key_considerations: Demonstrate capability interactively and address accuracy and data concerns to build confidence fast.

landing_pattern: Hero + Threat framing + Platform + Coverage + Proof + CTA
key_considerations: Convey vigilance and control; concrete coverage and outcomes beat fear-driven vagueness.

landing_pattern: Hero + Work showcase + Services + Process + About + CTA
key_considerations: Let the portfolio do the selling and treat the site itself as a demonstration of craft.

landing_pattern: Hero + Selected work + About + Skills + Contact
key_considerations: Make the work unmissable and the personality clear without clutter competing for attention.

landing_pattern: Hero + Atmosphere + Menu + Story + Location + Reserve
key_considerations: Sell the experience through mood and food imagery, then make reserving or finding the place effortless.

landing_pattern: Hero + Experience + Rooms + Amenities + Reviews + Book
key_considerations: Evoke escape and comfort with immersive visuals while keeping rates and booking always within reach.

landing_pattern: Hero + Search + Featured listings + Agents + Process + CTA
key_considerations: Put search and strong property imagery first; buyers scan many options before they commit to contact.

landing_pattern: Hero + Practice areas + Credentials + Cases + Team + CTA
key_considerations: Signal gravitas and discretion; credibility and clarity outweigh visual flourish in legal trust-building.

landing_pattern: Hero + Mission + Impact + Stories + Ways to give + Donate
key_considerations: Connect emotionally through real stories and concrete impact, then make giving simple and transparent.

landing_pattern: Hero + Trailer + Features + World + Community + CTA
key_considerations: Lead with spectacle and atmosphere; trailers and visuals sell the fantasy better than copy.

landing_pattern: Hero + Latest release + Music + Tour + About + Follow
key_considerations: Set a strong mood that matches the sound and make listening and following frictionless.

landing_pattern: Hero story + Top stories + Sections + Featured + Subscribe
key_considerations: Prioritize scannable hierarchy and reading comfort so dense content stays navigable and credible.

landing_pattern: Sidebar nav + Search + Content + Code blocks + Related
key_considerations: Optimize for fast retrieval with strong search, clear structure, and readable code and prose.

landing_pattern: Top bar + Filters + KPI cards + Charts + Tables
key_considerations: Maximize information clarity and density without overwhelm; let key metrics surface at a glance.

landing_pattern: Hero + Capabilities + Tracking + Network + Proof + CTA
key_considerations: Communicate reliability and reach; visibility into status and coverage reassures operational buyers.

landing_pattern: Hero + Coverage + How it works + Quote + Trust + CTA
key_considerations: Make complex coverage feel simple and safe, and put a fast, honest quote path front and center.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + Information + Resources + Contact
key_considerations: Prioritize accessibility, plain language, and findability so every citizen can complete their task.

landing_pattern: Hero + Philosophy + Services + Experience + Reviews + Book
key_considerations: Cultivate calm through soft palettes and breathing room that mirror the restorative promise.

landing_pattern: Hero + Vision + Protocol + Ecosystem + Community + CTA
key_considerations: Pair forward-looking energy with clear utility and transparency to counter hype fatigue.

landing_pattern: Hero + Solutions + Outcomes + Logos + Case studies + CTA
key_considerations: Speak to multiple stakeholders with ROI, security, and proof that the platform scales reliably.

landing_pattern: Hero + Value prop + How it works + Early proof + Waitlist
key_considerations: Communicate one clear idea fast and capture interest before over-investing in polish or scope.

landing_pattern: Hero + Latest episode + Episodes + About + Subscribe
key_considerations: Make the newest episode instantly playable and give listeners every easy way to subscribe.

landing_pattern: Hero + How it works + Cuisines + App + Offer + CTA
key_considerations: Show speed and variety with crave-worthy imagery and a one-tap path from craving to order.

landing_pattern: Hero + How it works + Success stories + Safety + Download
key_considerations: Inspire optimism and belonging while making safety and authenticity visibly central to the experience.

landing_pattern: Hero + Use cases + Features + Workflow + Proof + CTA
key_considerations: Show how it removes friction from daily work, keeping the interface calm and the value immediate.

landing_pattern: Hero + Inbox preview + Features + Speed + Privacy + CTA
key_considerations: Emphasize speed, focus, and privacy since users are deeply attached to existing email habits.

landing_pattern: Hero + Pipeline view + Features + Integrations + ROI + CTA
key_considerations: Demonstrate pipeline clarity and time saved, and prove it fits an existing sales stack smoothly.

landing_pattern: Hero + Modules + How it works + Compliance + Proof + CTA
key_considerations: Balance warmth toward people with reassurance on compliance and the rigor admins require.

landing_pattern: Hero + Dual value + How it works + Listings + Trust + CTA
key_considerations: Serve both sides clearly and foreground trust mechanisms that make strangers comfortable transacting.

landing_pattern: Hero + What's inside + How it works + Plans + Reviews + CTA
key_considerations: Sell anticipation and curation, then make the recurring value and easy cancellation obvious.

landing_pattern: Hero + Model showcase + Specs + Configurator + Offers + CTA
key_considerations: Let the vehicle command the screen with cinematic imagery and a clear path to configure or test drive.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + New-patient offer + Team + Reviews + Book
key_considerations: Defuse dental anxiety with bright honest cleanliness and real staff faces; make the new-patient booking and insurance answer obvious.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + Meet the vets + Pet stories + Hours + Book
key_considerations: Pets are family, so lead with warmth and real animal photos; surface emergency hours and what to expect over clinical sterility.

landing_pattern: Hero + Treatments + Before/after + Providers + Pricing + Consult
key_considerations: Sell aesthetic results and medical credibility together; real (consented) before/after and provider qualifications beat luxury-spa staging alone.

landing_pattern: Hero + Conditions + How it works + Therapists + Results + Book
key_considerations: Show movement and recovery progress, not a generic clinic; lead with the specific injury paths and a believable return-to-activity timeline.

landing_pattern: Hero + Refill + Services + Transfer + Pharmacist + CTA
key_considerations: Make refilling and transferring a prescription the unmissable primary action; reassure on safety and a real pharmacist, not retail clutter.

landing_pattern: Hero + How it works + Conditions + See a doctor + Pricing + Start
key_considerations: Make the on-screen 3-step path to a real clinician the hero; address wait time, licensing, and what gets treated to overcome remote-care doubt.

landing_pattern: Hero + Care levels + Community + Staff + Family resources + Tour
key_considerations: Speak to the adult child making the decision; convey dignity and real residents, with care levels and a tour path clear, not institutional grey.

landing_pattern: Hero + Exams + Eyewear + Book + Insurance + CTA
key_considerations: Bridge clinical eye-health and the retail frame experience; make booking an exam and browsing frames both first-class, vision crisp throughout.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + For parents + Providers + Portal + Book
key_considerations: Reassure the parent first, delight the child second; keep it bright and credible with real providers, not cartoon-juvenile, and surface the portal.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + Service area + Reviews + Financing + Call
key_considerations: Lead with response time, a real phone number, and proof of the actual crew and trucks; local reviews and a trade license beat stock corporate polish.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + Lookbook + Stylists + Pricing + Book
key_considerations: The work IS the pitch — lead with a real lookbook and the actual chair experience; make online booking with a named stylist effortless.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + Why us + Reviews + Estimate + Call
key_considerations: Counter the distrust of mechanics with transparency: upfront estimates, real techs, warranty terms; gritty-honest beats slick-corporate here.

landing_pattern: Hero + How it works + Pricing + Trust/vetting + Reviews + Book
key_considerations: Sell the relief of a clean home and the trust of a vetted person in it; instant pricing and background-check proof matter more than sparkle clip-art.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + Portfolio + Service area + Reviews + Quote
key_considerations: Show real transformed yards in this region's plants and seasons; before/after and a local service map beat a generic green gradient.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + How it works + Quote + Reviews + Book
key_considerations: Movers sell trust with your stuff — lead with the crew, insurance, and a fast honest quote; transparent pricing counters the industry's bad reputation.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + Service area + Response time + Reviews + Call
key_considerations: An emergency-driven trade: make the call button and response time the hero, license and ID-on-arrival visible to defeat the scam-locksmith fear.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + Gallery + Pricing + Reviews + Book
key_considerations: Lead with adorable real before/after of actual pets; warmth and the groomer's gentleness sell more than price, with easy booking by pet size/breed.

landing_pattern: Hero + Programs + A day here + Safety + Staff + Tour
key_considerations: Reassure parents on safety and warmth simultaneously; show a real day, named caregivers, and ratios — credible-bright, never scary-sterile or saccharine.

landing_pattern: Hero + Subjects + How it works + Tutors + Results + Book
key_considerations: Show a credible path to a grade or score with real outcomes and qualified tutors; encouraging-not-juvenile, with matching and scheduling up front.

landing_pattern: Hero story + Destinations + Latest posts + About + Subscribe
key_considerations: Let the photography and a strong narrative voice lead; this is a personal place, not a booking funnel — make reading and subscribing the natural path.

landing_pattern: Hero + Gallery + Services + Real weddings + Pricing + Inquire
key_considerations: Sell the feeling through real (not stock) celebrations; elegance and a clear inquiry path matter, with a palette drawn from the actual venue or season.

landing_pattern: Hero + Portfolio + Services + Process + About + Inquire
key_considerations: The portfolio is the entire argument — full-bleed real rooms lead; convey taste and material sense, with process and inquiry clear but understated.

landing_pattern: Hero + Collection + Lookbook + Story + Shop + CTA
key_considerations: Lead with the lookbook and a confident point of view; the brand's own art direction sets the palette, with shopping a click away but never cheapening it.

landing_pattern: Hero + Bestsellers + Shade finder + Ingredients + Reviews + Shop
key_considerations: Make swatches and shade-matching the hero; real skin tones and honest ingredient/results proof beat airbrushed model gloss for modern beauty buyers.

landing_pattern: Hero + Collections + Craftsmanship + Bespoke + Story + Shop
key_considerations: Let the piece and its material catch light at scale; provenance, metal, and stone specificity convey value far more than a generic luxury-serif costume.

landing_pattern: Hero + Shop beans + Origins + Subscription + Story + CTA
key_considerations: Sell origin, roast, and ritual; the roast browns and real bag/origin story set the palette, with subscription and brew guidance over hipster cliche.

landing_pattern: Hero + Our drinks + Taproom + Story + Events + Visit
key_considerations: Convey craft and place — the actual liquid, label art, and the room; lead taproom hours and tastings with a palette from the brew or terroir, not novelty fonts.

landing_pattern: Hero + Classes + Schedule + Instructors + Pricing + Book
key_considerations: Convey calm and capability without spa cliche; real studio light and instructors lead, with the schedule and a first-class offer immediately bookable.

landing_pattern: Hero + Featured gear + Field stories + Tech + Reviews + Shop
key_considerations: Earn credibility with real field photography and durability proof, not studio-staged kit; the terrain and use set the palette, gear specs front and center.

landing_pattern: Hero + Products + Why parents trust us + Safety + Reviews + Shop
key_considerations: Reassure tired parents fast — safety, real families, honest reviews; soft-but-credible warmth, with the trap being saccharine pastel-overload over substance.

landing_pattern: Hero + Featured pieces + Rooms + Materials + Reviews + Shop
key_considerations: Let the material and silhouette lead in real rooms; convey craft and scale honestly, with the wood/textile palette and dimensions clear over flat-pack vibes.

landing_pattern: Hero + Staff picks + Events + Categories + About + Visit
key_considerations: Lean into curation and personality — staff picks and events are the soul; a warm literary character beats a sterile catalog, with store hours and a story.

landing_pattern: Hero + Shop arrangements + Occasions + Subscription + Story + CTA
key_considerations: Let the actual blooms and seasonal color lead; arrangement artistry and same-day delivery sell, with the flowers' own palette over a default floral pink.

landing_pattern: Hero + Hero product + Ingredients + Routine + Results + Shop
key_considerations: Modern skincare buyers want efficacy proof — ingredient transparency, real results, and routine clarity beat clinical-white minimalism or wellness fluff.

landing_pattern: Hero + What you'll get + Recent issues + About + Subscribe
key_considerations: This is a person, not a brand — voice and a clear subscribe value lead; the writing samples and personality differentiate over a templated newsletter LP.

landing_pattern: Hero + Speakers + Agenda + Venue + Tickets + Register
key_considerations: Create urgency and FOMO with real speakers and a scannable agenda; the event's own brand and date drive a clear ticket CTA over generic tech-event neon.

landing_pattern: Hero + Search + Featured jobs + Categories + For employers + CTA
key_considerations: Search is the product — make it the hero with real, fresh listings; serve both seekers and employers, with credibility from filled-role proof over stock office art.

landing_pattern: Hero + Spaces + Amenities + Community + Pricing + Tour
key_considerations: Sell the real space and the community in it — actual photos and member life; plans, location, and a tour path lead over a generic startup-loft aesthetic.

landing_pattern: Hero + Who I help + Approach + Results + About + Book
key_considerations: Trust is personal here — a real face, specific outcomes, and a defined niche lead; quiet authority and a clear booking path beat guru-stock and vague promises.

landing_pattern: Hero + Services + Who we serve + Process + Pricing + Consult
key_considerations: Convey accuracy and approachability for small-business owners; clear services, real credentials, and transparent pricing beat stiff corporate-finance navy.

landing_pattern: Hero + Projects + Services + Process + Safety + Quote
key_considerations: Lead with completed real projects at scale and the crew; safety record, licensing, and project proof convey capability over a generic hardhat-clipart look.

landing_pattern: Hero + Capabilities + Certifications + Industries + Quality + Contact
key_considerations: Speak to procurement engineers: real capabilities, tolerances, and certifications lead; capability and quality proof beat vague industrial stock and blue gradients.

landing_pattern: Hero + Solution + How it works + Field results + Proof + CTA
key_considerations: Bridge real farming and data credibility — actual fields plus the yield numbers; ground in soil, crop, and season color over a sterile SaaS-on-a-tractor look.

landing_pattern: Hero + How it works + Savings + Installation + Proof + Quote
key_considerations: Lead with concrete savings and the real install process; sun/sky optimism plus honest payback numbers beat vague green-tech gradients and eco-cliche.

landing_pattern: Hero + Plans + Coverage + Speed + Support + CTA
key_considerations: Make plans and coverage the clear decision — real speeds, transparent pricing, a coverage map; counter telecom distrust with honesty over flashy network art.

landing_pattern: Hero + Welcome + Service times + Beliefs + Get involved + Visit
key_considerations: Welcome newcomers warmly — service times, what to expect, and real community lead; sincere and inviting beats either stiff-institutional or trend-chasing hype.

landing_pattern: Hero + Current exhibition + Visit + Collection + Events + Plan
key_considerations: Let the art and exhibition lead at full scale; the institution's own identity and the current show set the palette, with visit info and ticketing always reachable.

landing_pattern: Hero + Next fixture + News + Players + Tickets + Shop
key_considerations: Channel club identity and fan energy — the team's real colors and crest lead; the next fixture, tickets, and players drive action over generic sports-template neon.

landing_pattern: Hero + The product + Process/provenance + Makers + Where to buy + CTA
key_considerations: Sell provenance and process — the named farm, the actual method, the single harvest; let the material's own color and the work itself lead over a default cream-and-serif heritage costume.

landing_pattern: Hero + The bakes + Our method + Visit/order + Story + CTA
key_considerations: Let the crumb and crust do the selling with honest product shots; source the palette from the actual bake and lead ordering or hours over a script-font-on-flour cliche.
